xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #75

plan.title: Update page title line: add "... Your work companion!" after Relaxanator

narratives.Description: Update page title line: add "... Your work companion!" after Relaxanator
narratives.Overview:
## Summary Update the on-page brand/title line so that after **Relaxanator** it includes the tagline **... Your work companion!** ## Request (Baba) > change the title line of the page. after Relaxanator, add ... Your work companion! ## Current behavior - Visible H1 in `src/app/page.tsx` is currently just `Relaxanator`: ```tsx

Relaxanator

``` - Document / metadata title in `src/app/layout.tsx` uses `APP_NAME = "Relaxanator"` (browser tab, OG, PWA apple title, etc.). ## Desired behavior - After the word "Relaxanator" on the page title/brand line, add `... Your work companion!` (exact punctuation/spacing as written, or closest natural placement that matches the request). - Clarify during implementation whether this change is **H1-only** (page header) or also updates document/metadata titles — default assumption: **visible page H1 / brand line**; leave tab/manifest titles as product name unless product wants the tagline there too. ## Acceptance criteria - [ ] Page header title line reads something like: `Relaxanator ... Your work companion!` - [ ] Layout/styling still looks intentional on mobile and desktop - [ ] No unrelated copy/metadata changes unless explicitly included ## Notes for implementer Primary touchpoint: `src/app/page.tsx` (`

` inside `.app-header`).

items.title: Page header title line reads something like: `Relaxanator ... Your work companion!`
Layout/styling still looks intentional on mobile and desktop
No unrelated copy/metadata changes unless explicitly included

references.title: Issue #75: Update page title line: add "... Your work companion!" after Relaxanator
